landing.subtitle: Peyo's business validation service. Forms are accessed by invitation and analysts review each request from the panel.

clients.title: API clients
clients.subtitle: Consumers of the KYB API, identified by their API key. Issue, rotate or revoke keys, tune their rate limit and monitor usage.
clients.empty: No API clients yet. Issue a key to get started.
clients.confirmRevoke: Revoke this API key? It will stop working immediately.
clients.keyOnceBody: This is the only time it is shown in clear text. Store it somewhere safe; it cannot be recovered later.

webhooks.title: Webhook endpoints
webhooks.httpsOnly: https only, port 443. Private, loopback and link-local IPs are rejected.
webhooks.empty: No endpoints yet. Register one to receive webhooks.
webhooks.secretOnceBody: This is the only time it is shown. Store it to verify the x-kyb-signature; it cannot be recovered later.

integration.title: Integration configuration
integration.keyNote: Shown in full only when issued or rotated. Store it as a secret.
integration.multipleEndpoints: Multiple endpoints; the block uses the first one.
integration.endpointNote: Register a webhook endpoint below to get its ID.
integration.secretNote: Shown only when registering or rotating the endpoint.
integration.keyOnceBody: This is the only time it is shown in clear text. Store it; it cannot be recovered later.

forms.title: Forms
forms.importHint: Pick a .json file from your device or paste its content below.
forms.empty: No forms yet. Create one or import from DIDIT.

builder.imageInvalidType: The file is not an image.
builder.confirmDeleteField: Delete this question? This action cannot be undone.
builder.confirmDeleteSection: Delete this section and all its questions? This action cannot be undone.
builder.presetDuplicateKeys: Some fields with existing keys were duplicated
builder.presetEmptyTargetHint: They'll be added to the first section.
builder.diditIncompatible: This review isn't compatible with the current field type
builder.diditReq_aml_screening: Apply it on the full-name question (text). It also takes from the same section, when present: date of birth, nationality, document number and entity type (person/company).
builder.diditReq_id_verification: Apply it on the file question holding the document front. The back is taken from another file question in the same section whose key contains "back" or "reverso".
builder.diditReq_proof_of_address: Apply it on the file question holding the proof of address (PDF or image).
builder.diditReq_email_verification: Requires an email-type question. No automatic verification on submit yet.
builder.diditReq_phone_verification: Requires a text question with the phone number. No automatic verification on submit yet.
builder.diditReq_database_validation: Apply it on a text question in the section with the personal data. Uses from the same section: first_name, last_name, date of birth, personal_number/CURP and issuing_state.
builder.diditReq_age_estimation: Apply it on a selfie or file question showing the person's face.
builder.diditReq_liveness: Apply it on a selfie question (camera capture).
builder.diditReq_face_match: Apply it on the selfie question. It needs a reference document: pick it below (front, optional back) or the detected front in the section is used.
builder.diditReq_kyb_registry: Apply it on the legal-name question (text). The country (required) and the registration number are picked in this popover; when left on "Automatic", they are detected from other questions' key names.
builder.kybNoCountryWarning: The form has no country question. Add one (country type) or pick it here — without a country the registry validation cannot run.
builder.kybDuplicateWarning: An earlier question already carries the company validation: only the first one in the form runs. Remove this review or the other one.

admin.question: Question
admin.kybRunError: Could not run the registry validation.
admin.kybSearchByName: Search by name (always goes through review)
admin.kybMissingCountry: Country missing — the search cannot run.
admin.kybWillSendNote: The search is free (~90 s). The full profile (billable) is only fetched on an exact registration-number match or when you select a candidate.
admin.kybPhase_search: Searching company in the registry… DIDIT confirms in ~1–2 min; refresh the page to see the result.
admin.kybErrorRetry: The search failed and can be retried (free).
admin.kybPreliminaryHint: DIDIT is confirming these with the registry (~1–2 min). Selection becomes available once the search resolves.
admin.kybBlocked_NAME_ONLY_MATCH: Name-only search: automatic selection is blocked and requires human review.
admin.kybBlocked_NO_EXACT_REGISTRATION_MATCH: No candidate exactly matches the declared registration number.
admin.kybBlocked_MULTIPLE_EXACT_MATCHES: Several candidates share the declared registration number.
admin.kybBlocked_CANDIDATE_NOT_FETCHABLE: The exact-number candidate is not available for retrieval.
admin.kybCandidatesHint: The search returned candidate companies. Select the right one; fetching the full profile is a billable operation.
admin.kybNoCandidates: The search found no companies in the registry.
admin.kybConfirmSelect: This action will request the full company profile from DIDIT and may incur a charge. The selection cannot be undone. Continue?
admin.kybNoneMatchedInfo: The analyst marked that no candidate corresponds to the declared company.
admin.kybAttemptedInfo: Select requested — outcome uncertain. Check the DIDIT console for an existing session; it will not be retried automatically.
admin.kybSuperseded: Cycle superseded by a newer search.
admin.selectFields: Select the questions to fix and explain what should change.
admin.changesSentBody: Share this link with the applicant so they can fix the flagged questions.

form.invalidBody: The link is not valid. Please check with whoever shared it.
form.expiredBody: This link is no longer available. Please request a new one.
form.receivedBody: Your information has been submitted and is under review. Thank you!
form.submittedBody: Your information was received and is under review. Thank you.
form.correctionBanner: Fix the flagged questions. Your previous answers are read-only.
form.unavailableBody: This form does not exist or is not published yet.
form.startBody: Fill out this form to submit your request. Your progress is saved automatically.
form.startError: Could not start the request. Try again.
form.submitFailed: Could not submit. Check your connection and try again.
form.missingFields: You're missing {count} required field(s). Taking you to the first one.
form.documentsHint: Certificate of incorporation, power of attorney, etc. (max 15 MB)
form.acceptTerms: I confirm the information provided is accurate and authorize its verification.

didit.title: DIDIT forms
didit.subtitle: Workflows and questionnaires from your DIDIT account. You can view their questions and import them as the base of the app form.
didit.emptyWorkflows: No workflows in your DIDIT account.
didit.noApiKeyHint: Add DIDIT_API_KEY to your .env.local to list forms from the DIDIT API.
didit.empty: No forms in your DIDIT account.
didit.noQuestions: No questions detected. Check the format in DIDIT.
didit.previewSubtitle: Preview of the fields imported from DIDIT.
